creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
I tried build of all ports depending on www/rubygem-rack with poudriere and 13.1-RELEASE amd64 jail. And build of following 2 ports failed at stage-qa error.

* benchmarks/rubygem-derailed_benchmarks
* benchmarks/rubygem-gitlab-derailed_benchmarks

But same errors also happen with original ports tree. So attached patch doesn't cause any new error.
